---
title: "Network"
sidebar: references
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_references.py; edit specs/dasdae-inventory.yml instead. -->

FDSN-like organizational container below an inventory.

Aliases: `Net`

## Attributes

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `code` | str | Network code. |
| `name` | str | Human-readable network name. |
| `description` | str | Network description. |
| `fiber_arrays` | tuple[[FiberArray](FiberArray.qmd), ...] | Fiber arrays associated directly with this network. |
| `stations` | tuple[[Station](Station.qmd), ...] | Station-level observing identities associated with this network. |
| `notes` | str | Additional notes. |

## Contains

- [FiberArray](FiberArray.qmd)
- [Station](Station.qmd)

## Contained By

- [Inventory](Inventory.qmd)

## References

_None._

## Referenced By

_None._
